expectations.text: Response mentions `runic init` to scaffold the directory
expectations.evidence: Step 2 shows `runic init` with full output listing env.py, script.py.mako, and versions/

expectations.text: env.py example references 'socialnet' as graph_name or FALKORDB_GRAPH
Migration upgrade body calls op.create_range_index for User.email
Migration upgrade body calls op.create_constraint for User email
Migration downgrade drops constraint before the range index
expectations.evidence: downgrade shows drop_constraint then drop_range_index with explicit comment

expectations.text: Response shows `runic upgrade` (with or without 'head') to apply the migration
expectations.evidence: `runic upgrade head` shown in Step 6 and summary
